info.name: Stripe Customer Portal API
info.description:
The Billing customer portal is a Stripe-hosted UI for subscription and billing management. A portal session describes the instantiation of the customer portal for a particular customer.

Contact Support:
 Name: Stripe Dev Platform Team
 Email: dev-platform@stripe.com

urlencoded.description: (Required) The ID of an existing customer.
The ID of an existing portal configuration to use.
The URL to redirect the customer to after they are done in the portal.

request.description: Creates a session of the customer portal.

header.description: Added as a part of security scheme: basic
